category_sources: source_facts.description says CLI for the Jinja2 templating language; official GitHub README says it is the CLI for Jinja2.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is jinja2-cli; official GitHub repository is mattrobenolt/jinja2-cli.
docs_sources: Official README links to docs/ for full documentation and includes install, formats, features, and examples.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; official GitHub page identifies mattrobenolt/jinja2-cli as the project repo.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README describe a command-line Jinja2 renderer supporting JSON, INI, ENV, querystring, TOML, and optional YAML/XML/HJSON/JSON5 formats.
